tagline: A nail studio reduced to its essential parts.

hero.heading: A nail studio. Reduced to its essential parts.
hero.subheading: Structured gel, builder-gel extensions, Russian manicures, and hand-painted minimalism. No upsells, no fillers, no surprises on the receipt.

about.label: The room
about.heading: Four chairs. Daylight. Two questions before the polish.
paragraphs: Euphoria is a four-chair nail boutique in central Glendale. Owned and run by one team since 2018 with a small list of services priced in flat numbers — no per-finger upcharges, no surprise add-ons, no upsells.
We work k-beauty style: dry e-file prep, sealed sidewalls, cuticles cleaned not cut. Builder gel for extensions, structured gel for overlays, freehand art when you ask.
Two questions before any polish goes down: how long do you need it to last, and what kind of week are you having. Everything after that follows from the answers.

services.title: Signature Gel
services.description: K-beauty dry prep, structured gel in your colour, sealed sidewalls. Wears clean for twenty-one days.

services.title: Builder Gel Extensions
services.description: Soft-square, almond, or coffin. Sculpted on the natural nail. Gentle removal on rebook.

services.title: Russian Manicure
services.description: Dry e-file based cuticle reset. The cleanest sidewall you'll find; longest-wearing prep we offer.

services.title: Freehand Art
services.description: Hand-painted minimalist design — line art, micro-french, single-stroke detail. By the nail.

services.title: Russian Spa Pedicure
services.description: Dry e-file pedicure with full callus refinement and structured gel. Forty-five minutes.

services.title: Soak-Off & Strengthen
services.description: Acetone-wrap removal, strengthening treatment, buff and prep. Thirty minutes flat.

reviews.name: Maya O.
reviews.text: The Russian manicure is the closest a salon has come to making my nails look untouched. Sets hold for three weeks, removal is gentle, and the room is the kind of quiet I pay for.

reviews.name: Yana R.
reviews.text: Booked builder gel extensions before a trip. Eight weeks later the set still has no lift and removal took twenty minutes. Best technique I've had in LA.

reviews.name: Sona P.
reviews.text: Asked for a tiny line-art design and the technician planned it in seconds, then painted it in one stroke per nail. Walked out with the cleanest minimal set I have ever had.

contact.mapEmbedQuery: Euphoria Nail Boutique, 417 N Brand Blvd, Glendale, CA 91203

seo.title: Euphoria Nail Boutique — Modern minimalist nail studio in Glendale
seo.description: Glendale nail boutique with Russian manicure, structured gel, builder extensions, and hand-painted minimalist art. Flat prices, no add-ons.

typography.heading: Khand
typography.label: Source Code Pro
typography.mood: brutalist, modernist, pure-white, safety-orange-signal, condensed industrial display

moves: Pure WHITE BG with 2px BLACK section borders — true flat brutalism, zero shadows
Single safety-orange signal — only used on /// mono labels, hero accent word, and footer wordmark dot
Massive Khand display headline taking the full viewport — clamp 3.5rem to 11rem
Hero photo desaturated to true grayscale, 2px black border, square aspect — no rounding
Stats on a pure BLACK slab with safety-orange labels and white Khand numerals
Menu is a flat ordered list with /01 mono indices in safety orange — no cards, hairline rules only
Reviews on full pure-black slab in a 3-column grid with WHITE 2px borders between each
Visit map filter: grayscale(0.9) contrast(1.05) — monochrome utility map
Closing CTA on safety orange with BLACK pill button — bracket-styled `[ CALL · phone ]`
Footer credits 'SET IN KHAND + SOURCE CODE PRO'
